ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type (e.g., Casual Leave, Medical Leave) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "max_allowed_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for this leave type */,
  "carry_forward_policy" TEXT /* Policy for carrying forward unused leave days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the request */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type requested */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "no_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days for the leave */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the leave request (e.g., New, Approved, Declined) */,
  "leave_type_comment" TEXT /* Additional comment for leave type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES leave_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave status (e.g., New, Approved, Declined) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the status means */,
  "is_terminal_state" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this status is a terminal state (e.g., Approved, Declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department managed by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave balance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total days allotted for the leave type */,
  "used_days" INTEGER /* Number of days used */,
  "remaining_days" INTEGER /* Number of remaining days */,
  "carry_forward_days" INTEGER /* Number of days carried forward from the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave request being audited */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., Approved, Declined) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comment for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_audit_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Employee, Manager, HR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user/employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave policy */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type */,
  "min_service_required" INTEGER /* Minimum service period required before availing leave */,
  "probation_period" INTEGER /* Probation period for new employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_policies_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)
